name: lightning-rider-plugins
description: Thin agent-contract plugins that drive lightning-rider-999's self-hosted command-line tools. Each plugin ships skills only: it pre-approves the tool's binary, checks the binary is installed (pointing at the tool's installer if not), and discovers the live operation surface from the binary itself rather than bundling a snapshot that drifts.

plugins.name: stashbox
plugins.description: Drives the read-only `stashbox` CLI for querying a stash-box GraphQL instance (StashDB or any other) — scenes, performers, studios, tags, edits, drafts, fingerprints.

plugins.name: stash
plugins.description: Drives the `stash` CLI for querying and operating a Stash media server over its GraphQL API.
